h0a2ef3a5g6f80g478cga562g0a27bc9654be: I've always said the mind is the most powerful weapon in the world.
hfbbe4e93g57fdg4d5ega851g54cc33c3edd7: Forget the sword, forget the mountain-crumbling might of giants: anything can be conquered when your mind outranks your opponent's.
h2f27299dg5ec9g42d6g8d98gfac3b8d89fb1: Yet I've never seen such a literal display of that dictum. The dominion of these True Souls is terrifying to behold.
h713a8872gf23ag4b99g8ab8gc72bc86c8e50: They have to be stopped. They're more dangerous than a thousand dragons combined.
he2a3c3e1g31dcg45ffg8809g9c732ba56248: They most certainly have that potential.
hb460891eg11b9g47c8ga18ag76c96a1e7300: What we're witnessing is the pinnacle of mind control - the mind flayer's vile art polished to a state of perfection.
he5c1a727gf533g41e2gad81g1bfa281dc09d: Worlds will fall unless we stop them.
hb77d49dag4c6bg4fedgb9f4gdc4a1ecab53a: To dominate a few thralls hardly rivals the might of giants.
he5d50c52gc945g4484g9d5fg5975710fdcd5: But look at what one True Soul can accomplish. Imagine an army of them.
h2a936115ga9d6g46c6g81a9g78cf548c9b7d: It was terrifying indeed to have him take control like that.
h245e8a50g9ff8g4680ga37cgfc67fb32215c: And that was just one True Soul among the many we've met. Imagine an army of them.
h38586bf3gb3e5g4e69g9e93gc261a878a822: Why stand in fear of a power that could soon be ours to command?
h75875e13g1b9fg4b31gb74fge04631550372: Why, because it's the illusion of command. The true strings are being pulled by a many-tentacled spider.
